case_title: KELLER, REGULA VS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KELLER, REGULA AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL SENT TO RICHARD WEINER, AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR YELLOW CAB COOP. RETURNED SIGNED.
PLTF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FILED. $10.00 FEE PAID.
PLTF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR APPROVAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-24-2007, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO FEB-14-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. HEALTH PROBLEMS.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO RICO-MAESTRI - 210 4TH ST, OAKLAND, CA 94607
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; PAID $10 FEE; FOLDER UTL/506;TO TRAY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-14-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-28-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS LEAVE TO FILE THIS LATE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELLER, REGULA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC. $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,585.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $2000 FOR LOST WAGES, AND $3500 FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-28-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-14-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 THE HEARING DATE OF FEBRUARY 28, 2007, IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED ON 2-14-07 AND THE CASE WAS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC.
